series_metadata.series_description: This form is completed by a Corporate Taxpayer to officially notify the Department of its intention to dissolve the corporation''s Ohio charter or surrender its Ohio license.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in files for 4 years, then destroy. If scanned, retain 6 mos. after scanning, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
